name: webvault

scripts.admin:help:
echo 'WebVault Admin CLI Tools

Usage:
  npm run admin:create -- --email=admin@example.com --password=SecurePass123 --name="Admin User"
  npm run admin:list [-- --format=table|json] [--limit=20]
  npm run admin:update -- --id=uuid-here --name="New Name" [--email=new@email.com]
  npm run admin:delete -- --id=uuid-here [--confirm]
  npm run admin:reset-password -- --email=admin@example.com [--password=NewPass123]
  npm run admin:status -- --email=admin@example.com
  npm run admin:unlock -- --email=admin@example.com
  npm run admin:verify-config  # 验证Supabase管理员专用配置
  npm run migration:export-users [-- --output=users.json] [--include-deleted]  # 导出Supabase用户数据
  npm run migration:export-data [-- --output-dir=./exports] [--verbose]  # 导出Supabase所有表数据
  npm run migration:import-to-clerk [-- --input=users.json] [--dry-run] [--continue-on-error]  # 导入用户到Clerk
  npm run migration:d1-setup [-- --dry-run] [--verbose] [--database-id=my-d1-db]  # 初始化D1数据库模式
  npm run migration:import-data [-- --input=export.json] [--batch-size=100] [--resume]  # 批量导入数据到D1
  npm run migration:resume [-- --checkpoint=migration-checkpoint.json] [--strategy=continue|retry|skip] [--interactive]  # 恢复失败的迁移
  npm run migration:validate [-- --mode=full|incremental|sample] [--table=table_name] [--verbose] [--output-dir=./validation-reports]  # 验证迁移完整性
  npm run migration:rollback [-- --dry-run] [--verify-only] [--auto-restart] [--backup-clerk-config] [--force] [--verbose]  # 快速回滚到Supabase

Environment variables required in .env.local:
  NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=https://xxx.supabase.co
  SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...
  CLERK_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_...
  NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=pk_test_...
  CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=your-account-id
  CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN=your-api-token
  CLOUDFLARE_D1_DATABASE_ID=your-d1-database-id

For detailed documentation, see: scripts/admin/README.md'

description: 个人网站目录管理平台，用于收藏、分类和管理工作生活中发现的优质网站资源
